Class BasicUpdate

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.query.Update
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.query.BasicUpdate

UpdateDefinition
public class BasicUpdate extends Update
Author:
Thomas Risberg, John Brisbin, Oliver Gierke, Christoph Strobl, Mark Paluch

  • Method Details

    • set

      @Contract("_, _ -> this") public Update set(String key, @Nullable Object value)
      Description copied from class: Update
      Update using the $set update modifier.
      Overrides:
      set in class Update
      Parameters:
      key - the field name.
      value - can be null. In this case the property remains in the db with a null value. To remove it use Update.unset(String).
      Returns:
      this.
      See Also:
      • MongoDB Update operator: $set

      @Contract("_ -> this") public Update unset(String key)

      Parameters:

      Returns:

      Parameters:

      inc - must not be null.

    • getUpdateObject

      public org.bson.Document getUpdateObject()
      Specified by:
      getUpdateObject in interface UpdateDefinition
      Overrides:
      getUpdateObject in class Update
      Returns:
      the actual update in its native Document format. Never null.
